ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to CCP section 583.420(a) for failure to serve within two years.

Visiting Judge: Barry Goode; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)
